description_long: This is a futuristic, angular airplane with a sleek, metallic exterior and a highly geometric design. The fuselage is elongated and tapers to a pointed nose, with a forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit featuring a clear canopy. The wings are sharply swept back and positioned low on the fuselage, with additional winglets and complex control surfaces visible. Multiple jet engines are integrated along the rear and sides, suggesting high-speed capability. The tail section features a distinctive H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers and horizontal stabilizers extending outward. The surface is predominantly gray with subtle panel lines and some yellow highlights, giving it a high-tech, military-inspired appearance.
description: A sleek, angular, metallic airplane with swept-back wings, multiple jet engines, and a forward-mounted enclosed cockpit. The design is futuristic and military-inspired, featuring an H-tail and complex control surfaces.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the twin vertical stabilizers, multiple jet engines, and the full span of the swept-back wings.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the elongated fuselage, low-mounted swept wings, and the forward cockpit canopy.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the pointed nose, cockpit canopy, and the angular arrangement of the wings and engines.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile similar to view 1, showing the same features from the other side.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept wings with additional winglets and complex control surfaces; no visible dihedral or anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Six jet engines integrated along the rear and sides of the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers and horizontal stabilizers extending outward.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with two main units and one nose gear unit visible.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a clear canopy, likely multi-seat based on size.
